The stages are: Draft, In Queue, Sending, and Sent.
The stages are: Draft, In Queue, Sending, and Sent.
The stages are: Draft, In Queue, Sending, and Sent.
The stages are: Draft, In Queue, Sending, and Sent.
Draft: the email is still being written/created.
In Queue: the email is scheduled to be sent at a later date.
Sending: the email is currently being sent to its recipients.
Sent: the email has already been sent to its recipients.

The Email Marketing application provides users with the ability to build mailing campaigns.
To do that, navigate to Email Marketing app --> Configuration --> Settings
the Mailing Campaigns feature must be activated in the Settings page
Once the Mailing Campaigns feature is activated, a new Campaigns menu option appears in the header.
When that is clicked, Odoo reveals a separate Campaigns page
displaying all the mailing campaigns... showcased in a default Kanban view.
This information can also be viewed in a list
Clicking any campaign from the Campaigns page reveals that campaign's form.

Campaigns can be created directly on the *Campaigns* page in the *Email Marketing* app
